title: Update: Sanco march is over
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The SANCO members...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The SANCO members who participated in the march, handed over a memorandum to George mayor, Jacqui von Brandis.


> "George will never be the same," said Xolisani Booi, SANCO regional chairperson, to the mayor of George, Jackie von Brandis.


He made it clear that while today was a peaceful march, the next one might very well not be should SANCO's demands not be met.

Von Brandis acknowledged receipt of the memorandum and the march and the taxis that participated in the peaceful march, have now dispersed.


> VIDEO: Jacques du Toit


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
